name: VORNADO REALTY TRUST
summary: Vornado is a fullyintegrated REIT and conducts its business through, and substantially all of its interests in properties are held by, the Operating Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership.Accordingly, Vornados cash flow and ability to pay dividends to its shareholders are dependent upon the cash flow of the Operating Partnership and the ability of its direct and indirect subsidiaries to first satisfy their obligations to creditors.Vornado is the sole general partner of and owned approximate...
